task_completion.description: Verifies the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the main OSCAR EMR dashboard, schedule screen, or administration panel indicating a successful login, ideally showing the user 'oscardoc'.

task_completion.description: Verifies navigation to the billing service code administration area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Administration panel or settings page specifically related to 'Billing', 'Fee Schedule', 'Service Codes', or 'Manage Billing Codes'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the correct service code is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Service Code', 'Code', or similar, containing the exact value 'K083'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the correct description is entered for the service code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a description text field containing the text 'Telephone Consultation (Mental Health)'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the correct unit price/fee is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fee, price, or unit price input field containing '45.00' (or '45').

task_completion.description: Verifies the code is set to active and successfully saved to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status dropdown or checkbox indicating 'Active', and evidence that the form was submitted (e.g., a success message, a 'Save'/'Add' button being clicked, or K083 appearing in the active fee schedule list).

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the web browser to interact with OSCAR EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the OSCAR EMR interface. The agent should not be using curl commands or API testing tools to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use SQL commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open running 'mysql', 'mariadb', or executing SQL INSERT statements directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verifies the inputs were made in the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the form fields being filled out are part of the OSCAR EMR web page, not a generic text editor, notepad, or mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log into OSCAR EMR using the credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117'. Note: While K083 is a real-world OHIP code that historically had different attributes and expired in 2022, the agent MUST use the synthetic values provided in the task description. Score based strictly on the requested synthetic values (Code: K083, Description: 'Telephone Consultation (Mental Health)', Unit Price: 45.00, Status: Active), not real-world OHIP fee schedules.
